description: Claude Sonnet 4.5 running a research agent with search + summarize + write_report tools. This is the expected well-behaved trajectory: search twice, summarize, write report. No retries, no forbidden tools, no infinite-search loops.

messages.content: Research and summarize the current state of LLM agent testing frameworks. Write a short report.

content.text: I'll start by searching for recent work on LLM agent testing.

content.content: Found 5 results: DeepEval, Evalcraft, LangWatch Scenario, EvalView, AgentEvals

content.text: Let me get a second angle on benchmarks.

content.content: Found: DeepEval has 50+ metrics, 6 agent-specific; EvalView uses golden baselines
Summary: Mature ecosystem; DeepEval dominant; gap around deterministic structural contracts.
